src/lib/ai/recommendations.ts.description: Observability logging pattern: Uses structured console.info/warn/error with LOG_PREFIX constants (e.g., "[AI:Recommendations]") for filtering. Logs include: prompt length, response time (ms), token usage (input/output/total), retry attempts with backoff, and priority breakdown. All logs pass a message string and a structured object as second parameter.

src/lib/db/queries/recommendations.ts.description: New queries directory created at src/lib/db/queries/. Contains CRUD operations pattern with: typed interfaces for filters/pagination/sort, buildFilterConditions helper for dynamic query construction, custom priority ordering via SQL CASE statement, bulk operations support, timestamp tracking for status changes (completedAt/dismissedAt), duplicate detection via ilike title matching.
